titleStmt.title: SII 25.161: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 161. (A.R. No. 161 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti, Tirumagaḷ-pōla, etc., of the king. Rājarājakēsari, who has been identified with Rājarāja I.

It records an undertaking given by the Śivabrāhmaṇas (names specified) of the temple of Sidhēśvaram of Tirunaṟaiyūr, a brahmadēya in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu, to supply 60 kalam of paddy for the different daily fod-offerings to the deity Kaṅkāḷadēva set up in the temple of Siddhēśvara, from the month of Vriśchika in the above year. The paddy thus provided was the interest (paliśai) collected on 30 kāśu, endowed by Nāraṇan Ambalam-uḍaiyān who belonged to Ātrēyagōtra and a resident of Amudamaṅgalam in the said nāḍu, a māṇi (dwarf) of the temple of Rājarājadēvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polaperu nilaccelviyun taṉakkeyurimai pūṇṭamai maṉak
koḷak kāntaḷurccālai kalama(ṟu)ttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampa pāṭi
yum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamu(tu)ṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻa
maṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum tiṇṭiṟal venṟi taṇṭāl ko
ṇṭa tanneḻilvaḷar Ūḻiyuḷḷellā yāṇṭum toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇ
ṭe ceḻiyarai tecukoḷ śrī kovirājarāja kecaripa- nmarāna śrīrājarāja devarkku
yāṇṭu 2 10 6 Āṟāvatu kṣatriyacikāmaṇivaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam tiruna
ṟaiyūr sidhiśvarattu civabrāhmaṇan mokiliyan Aṭikaḷ tāmatannum Ivan tampi mo
kiliyan Aṭikaḷ suntaranāna Eḻunūṟṟuvabhaṭṭanum kāśyapan malaiyanmālaiyum Ivan tam
pi malaiyan sūryyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa śivabrāhmaṇarom kai Eḻuttu . Iśvatteśvavarattu Eḻuntaruḷininṟa śrī
kaṅkāḷadevar śrībhaṇṭārattu caṇṭeśvara mahāniyokattālum Uṭaiyār śrīrājarāja devar koyil
māṇi Innāṭṭu Amutamaṅkalattu Āttiraiyan nāraṇan Ampalamuṭaiyān kaṇkāṇi
ṭakkaṭava kācu 3 10 Ikkācu muppatum koṇṭa . paricāvatu Ivvāṭṭai vṛścikanāyaṟu mutalāka kācinvāy pūviṟkala nel
lu palicaiyāka Āṭṭaiviṭṭam Aṭṭakkaṭava ḷa 6 10� In nellu Aṟupatin kalamum Aṭṭum paricāvatu . Ikkaṅkāḷa tevarkku tiruva
mitu Arici potu Irunāḻi Āka munṟu potaikkum nāḷvacam Aṭṭakkaṭava Arici Ivvarici Aṟunāḻikkum Aiñciraṇ
ṭu vaṇṇam vanta nellu kuṟuṇi Eḻu nāḻiyum nāḷvacam kaṟi Amutukku Aṭṭakkaṭava nāḻiḷayum Āka ḷapra In
nellu patakkum Ipparicināl nāḷ vacam vanta ciṟappin nāl vatetiruvamutu Ariciyum In nivan=tat(ā)til
le peṟuvānākavum Amutu cetār meṣamānatu nāṅkaḷe peṟuvatākavum Ipparicey Innilam cantrātita
vaṟ melcuṭṭa(ā)paṭṭa Ivanaivom Eṅkaḷuṭaiya peṟārum śantrātitavaṟ ceyvomākavum Ipparicu
Innivan=tam Ivannaivom Itdharmmam rakṣippār śrī(yi) panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
